description: SONICS domain recalibration of cosine similarity on MERT embeddings
approach: Banded diagonal cosine similarity with SONICS-domain calibration bounds
key_finding: SONICS domain recalibration recovers discrimination. The baseline failure was a calibration problem, not an architecture problem. MERT cosine similarity has real signal on SONICS pairs — it was just compressed into a range the MIPPIA bounds could not resolve.
